content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.2 Beta / test language WARN — SettingsView.swift:11 labels the "AI Sort" toggle "Experimental: may be unstable and lose sort order", user-visible copy suggesting an unfinished feature.
Pierre: Apple reviewers may flag in-app copy that admits a shipped feature is experimental/unstable, since it implies the release build is not finished — potentially triggering a 2.2 rejection or clarification request. The metadata and release notes are clean, but this SwiftUI string is shown directly to end users. Consider rewording to something like "This feature may change sort order occasionally" or gate it behind a clearer, non-alarming label before submission.
